title: Thorli Bahin
desc: After an accident injures her sister gravely, Ishwari makes a deal with a rich man and marries his son who suffers from an illness.

title: Thamb Laxmi Thamb
desc: A woman, who is an ardent devotee of Goddess Laxmi, receives help from the deity when she faces challenges in her married life.

title: Gaon Tasa Changla Pan Veshila Tangla
desc: Hindurao Patil and Appasaheb Desai's rivalry adversely affects their village. Situations worsen when Appasaheb's brother falls for Hindurao's sister after he saves her from an incident.

title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
desc: When Lord Shiva beheads Lord Ganesha, unaware of the fact that he is his son, Goddess Parvati asks Shiva to resurrect him. Later, he is renamed as Vighnaharta.

title: Mahabali Hanuman
desc: Hanuman, son of Anjani and Kesari, is an ardent devotee of Lord Rama. He possesses various virtuous qualities and leads an army of monkey warriors to protect the people against all evils.

title: Trusha
desc: A woman from a humble background gets enmeshed in a plan hatched by a devious young man and his father, a sly businessman aiming to snatch a piece of land owned by her family.

title: Shadow
desc: Raghuram, a journalist, exposes the criminal activities of an infamous gangster, who later murders him as revenge. Years later, Rajaram, Raghuram's son, decides to track down the killer.

title: Navra Majha Bhavra
desc: Baburao, a young man, faces several struggles in his personal and professional life and finds humorous solutions to deal with them.

title: Devachiye Dwari Kirtanachi Wari
desc: Religious leaders and devotees celebrate the rich tradition of kirtan, bringing divine melodies, spiritual discourses and devotion to the sacred doorstep of the Lord.

title: Prabhat Gaani
desc: A comprehensive compilation of melodious devotional songs sung by talented singers is played to seek the divine blessings of the Almighty.

title: Prabhat Gaani
desc: A comprehensive compilation of melodious devotional songs sung by talented singers is played to seek the divine blessings of the Almighty.

title: RJR Herbal Hospitals Teleshopping
desc: The host promotes the services offered by RJR Herbal Hospital where patients receive Ayurvedic treatment to treat various health problems.

title: Sant Dnyaneshwar
desc: Dnyaneshwar, a 13th century Maharashtrian Hindu saint, poet, philosopher and yogi of the Nath tradition, faces challenges and struggles while pursuing his goals.

title: RJR Herbal Hospitals Teleshopping
desc: The host promotes the services offered by RJR Herbal Hospital where patients receive Ayurvedic treatment to treat various health problems.

title: Topi Var Topi
desc: A fortune teller becomes a fraudster and dupes innocent people in a remote village. Soon, one of the residents decides to catch him as he makes an elaborate plan to bring justice to people.

title: Aali Laxmi Sasarla
desc: A couple turns murderers out of greed and uses pretence and lies to enter a wealthy family. Years later, their youngest daughter-in-law learns about their past crimes and plans to teach them a lesson.

title: Eka Lagnachi Gosht
desc: Srikanth, an open-minded man, finishes his studies in London and returns home, but clashes with his conservative family when he falls in love with a poor girl.

title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
desc: When Lord Shiva beheads Lord Ganesha, unaware of the fact that he is his son, Goddess Parvati asks Shiva to resurrect him. Later, he is renamed as Vighnaharta.

title: Mahabali Hanuman
desc: Hanuman, son of Anjani and Kesari, is an ardent devotee of Lord Rama. He possesses various virtuous qualities and leads an army of monkey warriors to protect the people against all evils.

title: Dhadakmar
desc: A man, who is forcibly married, decides to visit his uncle. However, during the journey, his suitcase is accidentally swapped with a criminal gang's briefcase.
